howItWorks.intro: This rules of origin calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Regional Content
rules.explanation: Percentage of product value from FTA member countries.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: Criteria to determine where a product was made, affecting eligibility for lower tariff rates.

faq.q: Why do rules of origin matter?
faq.a: Products meeting origin rules can get preferential (lower or zero) tariff rates under trade agreements.

howWeCalculate.intro: This rules of origin calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs

howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.

whenToUse.intro: This rules of origin calculator is designed for anyone who needs quick, reliable estimates.
